character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in discussions about the voyage and interacts with the squire and Long John Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Cook and later described as a shipmate, engages in conversations with Hawkins and the squire.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Described as the captain of the ship, involved in discussions with the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator and participant in interactions with Long John Silver and the squire.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in discussions and interactions with Dr. Livesey and Long John Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Described as the mate of the ship, interacts with the squire.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Captain of the ship, expresses dissatisfaction with the voyage and crew.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a character involved in the plot.
